name: qb_softhand_industry_msgs
description: This package contains the ROS messages for qbrobotics® SoftHand Industry.

ConnectionState.description: qb SoftHand Industry connection state message
ConnectionState.raw:
# qb SoftHand Industry connection state message

qb_softhand_industry_msgs/DeviceConnectionInfo device

DeviceConnectionInfo.description: qb SoftHand Industry message that constains:

ResourceData.description: qb SoftHand Industry resource data message
ResourceData.raw:
# qb SoftHand Industry resource data message

string name
float64 position
float64 velocity
float64 effort
float64 command

State.description: State message valid for qb SoftHand Industry
State.raw:
# State message valid for qb SoftHand Industry

#  - motors: position, command in [ticks], velocity in [ticks/s], effort in [mA]
qb_softhand_industry_msgs/ResourceData actuator

StateStamped.description: State message with stamped info valid for qb SoftHand Industry
StateStamped.raw:
# State message with stamped info valid for qb SoftHand Industry

std_msgs/Header header

qb_softhand_industry_msgs/State device_data
